name: vercel
description: Comprehensive Vercel ecosystem plugin with Codex-compatible skills and MCP.

interface.longDescription: Bring Vercel ecosystem guidance into Codex with curated skills and the official Vercel MCP server. Packages the upstream vercel/vercel-plugin skills, agents, and commands under the local `vercel` plugin identity for the Codex plugin marketplace.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo for Vercel deployment risks
Which Vercel tools fit this app best
Help wire Vercel MCP into this workflow
